name: SwaggerHub broken YAML anchor in JSON and broken multiline highlighting
description:
As of 8th June 2020

When using a YAML anchor in the spec JSON not correctly generated.

Open the below in the swagger UI (locally or at petstore.swagger.io)
https://api.swaggerhub.com/apis/andrewflbarnes/bug.broken-yaml-anchor-in-json/08.07.2020

The yaml anchor isn't correctly parsed in the JSON version and can't be
displayed by swagger UI. This will just resolve to
```
"objectWithYamlAnchorReference": {
  "type": "object",
  "properties": {
    "id": "id"
  }
}
```
It should be
```
"objectWithYamlAnchorReference": {
  "type": "object",
  "properties": {
    "id": {
      "type": "string",
      "format": "uuid",
      "example": "00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000000"
    }
  }
}
```

The error shown is
😱 Could not render n, see the console.

Console output:
```
at object-model.jsx:98
at immutable.js:3084
at immutable.js:2867
at immutable.js:3016
at immutable.js:2832
at immutable.js:2699
at ot.__iterate (immutable.js:2206)
at wt.__iterate (immutable.js:2698)
at At.__iterate (immutable.js:2830)
at r.Pt.r.__iterateUncached (immutable.js:3015)
```

Presence of the emoji above also prevents the newline from being displayed in
swaggerhub editor. This also happens with colons and other characters regardless
of where on the line they appear. e.g.

firstline
seco:ndline

firstline
secon-dline

firstline
second"line

firstline
secondline'

Newlines seem to display correctly on the Details popout of the swaggerhub home
page (https://app.swaggerhub.com/home)

You should also see on swaggerhub that these lines and the URL are incorrectly
highlighted in the editor because of the colon following https. A colon anywhere
in a multiline block breaks the formatting making the editor think it is no longer
in a string

example: example

"example" example

'example' example

*example &example
